trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 67.3 in the bullish momentum zone and MACD confirmation; deploys near-idle cash into Blue Owl Capital (diversified asset manager) with a clean technical setup before end-of-month window dressing fades

decisions.briefing: Markets closed mildly positive on the last trading day of April (S&P +0.4%, NASDAQ +0.1%), consistent with end-of-month institutional window dressing in momentum names. GOOGL is approaching its automatic +12% profit target at nearly +10% gain — auto-sell should trigger within a day or two. Cash was just below the $500 deployment threshold so a small, low-conviction position in OWL was initiated to reduce idle cash drag with a top-scoring momentum candidate.

market_education.summary_en: April 30 was the final session of the month, with U.S. equities posting modest gains as investors weighed a cautious macro backdrop against improved corporate earnings. The S&P 500 rose 0.4% while the NASDAQ gained just 0.1%, reflecting mixed sentiment between large-cap tech and the broader market. End-of-month 'window dressing' by institutional fund managers — buying outperforming stocks to improve portfolio optics ahead of monthly reports — likely supported momentum names like GOOGL and AMD that are already well extended on their RSI readings.
market_education.summary_zh: 4月30日為本月最後交易日，美股小幅收漲，投資者在謹慎宏觀環境與企業盈利改善之間尋求平衡。標普500指數上漲0.4%，納指僅微升0.1%，反映大型科技股與大市之間的情緒分歧。月底機構基金的「窗飾效應」——買入近期強勢股以美化月報持倉——可能為GOOGL及AMD等已超買的強勢股帶來額外支撐。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Window dressing occurs at the end of a month or quarter when fund managers buy stocks that have recently performed well, so their portfolio reports look impressive to clients and investors. This creates artificial short-term demand that can push already-strong momentum stocks even higher in the final sessions of the period. The effect is temporary — once the reporting period closes, the buying pressure fades and prices often give back some gains.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「窗飾效應」（Window Dressing）是指每逢月末或季末，基金經理買入近期表現強勁的股票，令投資組合報告對客戶更具吸引力。這種人為需求在結算期最後幾個交易日會推高強勢股的股價。然而此效應屬短線性質——結算期一過，買盤壓力消散，股價往往回吐部分升幅，投資者不宜追高。
